subcodes.first_line: O Son of Man! The Pen of the Most Merciful maketh mention of thee in the Most Great Prison, and proclaimeth: All the children [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای پسر انسان قلم رحمن در سجن اعظم تو را ذکر مینماید و میفرماید جمیع ابناء
subcodes.subjects: @prophecy and fulfillment, @corruption; misinterpretation of the Word of God, @station of the Manifestation of God, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @return of Christ; second coming of Christ
